title: Execute Student A-E validation matrix
description: Run the strong, copy-paste, mixed, bypass, and mastery student scenarios through real app workflows and record expected vs actual Understanding Score behavior.

title: Collect mentor verification rankings
description: Ask 1-2 mentors to rank anonymized students by apparent understanding, then compare the rankings against CodeOrbit's Understanding Score outputs.

title: Pilot safety cleanup
description: Remove production-facing fake-data mutation paths, restrict CORS to approved origins, and add basic rate-limit strategy for AI edge functions.

title: Define pilot acceptance checklist
description: Document the minimum conditions required before onboarding a real bootcamp pilot: auth, validation confidence, dashboard usability, support process, and rollback plan.
